---
title: "ANPP Data Merging"
author: "Kathy Condon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)
library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggtext)
library(ggh4x)
library(ggpattern)
library(data.table)
library(MuMIn)
library(scales)
library(performance)

```

## Set file directories - local
```{r}
dir.create(file.path("deluge"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge","data","R_exports"))
dir.create(file.path("deluge","figures"))
```

# Read in ANPP, precip, and trt info
```{r Siggers CCE pull}
#### pull data from Google Drive to local files - one at a time ####

## list all productivity files in drive by name
prod.files<-c("Linabury_ChANGE_ANPP.csv","CCE_ANPP_2025_R.csv","Condon_SLs_ANPP.csv","Hajek2024_ANPP.csv","Tooley_DRE_ANPP.csv","Post2020_ANPP.csv","Post2020_BNPP.csv","Post2021_ANPP.csv","Post2021_BNPP.csv","Hoover2022_CPER-DEX_Productivity.csv")

## read in drive folder
drive.files<-googledrive::drive_ls(googledrive::as_id("https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1-z0EMfF8_LTWr3HZVajzcO3K9jKgYM9p"))
  
## read in each file
for (i in prod.files){
  
file.name<-drive.files %>% 
  dplyr::filter(name == i) 

# if-else, to throw error if file name is incorrect or error would otherwise stop loop
if(nrow(file.name) == 1){
  googledrive::drive_download(file = .$id, 
                              overwrite = T,
                              path = file.path("deluge", 'data', i))
  
} else{
  message("File error - check name or if duplicated: ",i)
  }
}



```
